since_last: 35% of 85 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.78%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC -0.96% · Gold +0.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.42%. 35% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.78%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.78%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at +10.77%
cards.body: Leaders: INOD +10.77%, SPCX +9.97%, MGNI +8.54%, TLN +7.26%, ARM +6.03%. Laggards: INTC -6.39%, KLAC -5.50%, MRVL -5.47%, SMR -5.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +9.97% at $211.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +9.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
